subject: Arabic (WASSCE 2026-2030)
document_title: List of Arabic Texts for the West African Senior School Certificate Examination (WASSCE) 2026-2030

sections.section_name: SECTION A: Arabic Literature of West Africa (1800 to Date)
texts: 1. Abdul Wahhab Danladi Shittu: As-shiirul-Arabiyy An-Nayjīriyy Baynal Madi Wal-hadir (including poems by As-shaykh Uthman Bn Fudī and Asmaa Bint Shaykh Uthmāna Bn Fūdī)
2. Aliyu Abdulkadir Al-Asali: Abathut-Tufulah
3. Isa Alabi Abubakar: Allughatul-Arabiyyatu
4. Kamalud-Dini Balogun: Rihlatul bahthi anil insāni
5. Mbaye Kebba Kah: Risālātun Ila Shabab
6. Abdullah Bn Fodio: Risālātun-Nasa ihi
7. Mbaye Kebba Kah: Risālāh Ilal-Watan
8. Zakariyau Oseni: An-Nūjumul Mubtasima (Smiling Stars)
9. Muhammad Al-Amin Sambou Gasāmā: Al-'Ftikhar Bil Qarati Al-Ifriqiyyah Al-Arīqah

sections.section_name: SECTION B: Arabic Literature in the Modern Era (1798 Up To Date)
texts: 1. Mahmudu Sāmī Al-Bārūdi (Poem)
2. Ahmadu Shawqī: Atha'labu wad-Dīku (Fox and Cock)
3. Mustapha Lutfi-Almanfalūtī: Al-yatīmu (Orphan)
4. Mustafa Lutfi-Almanfalūtī: Al-Hijab (Veil)
5. Hafiz Ibrahim: Al-Lughatul-Arabiyyah Watarbiyatul Banāt

sections.section_name: SECTION C: Arabic Literature of the Abbasid and Umayyad Era (661-1798 AD)
texts: 1. Jarīru bn Atiyyah (Poem in eulogy of Al-Khalifah Umar bn Abdil-Azīz)
2. Al-Hajjāju Bn Yusuf Ath-Thaqafiyy (Sermon)
3. Al-mutanabbī (Poem of admonition and pride)
4. Abdullahi Bn-muqaffa'a (Message in relationship with a friend)
5. Al-Farazdaq (Poem in eulogy of Imam Zaynul-Abidīn)

sections.section_name: SECTION D: Arabic Literature in the Era of Early Islam and the Islamic Era (500AD-662AD)
texts: 1. Ar-Rasûl (SAW): First sermon in Makkah
2. Ukthumu Bn Sayfi At-Tamīmiyy: Sermon at Caesar's palace
3. Zuhayru bn Abi Sulmā: Philosophical poem (Al-Mimiyah)
4. Hassan bn Thabit: Poem on the Conquest of Makkah
5. Aliyyu Bn Abi Talib: Sermon on Jihad with sincerity

references: Ahmadul Iskandarī wa ākharūna; Al Mufassal fi Tarikhl Adab (v. 1 and 2)
Ahmadul Iskandarī wa ākharūna; Almuntakhab Minal-Adabil-Arabiyy
Zakariyah Husayn: Al-Ma'dubatul Adabiyyah Litullābil Arabiyyah Fi gharbi Ifriqiyyah
Abdulwahab Danlad Shittu, Ash-shirul Arabiy An-Nayjīriyy baynal mādī wal hadir
Aliyyu Abubakar, Ath-thaqafatul Arabiyyatu Fi Nayjīriyya
Shayku Ahamadu Saidu Galadanchi, Harakatul Lughatil Arabiyya Fi Nayjirriyya
Uthman Abduls-Salam Muhammad (Al-thaqafi), Tarikhul Adabil-Arabiyy Fi Madinati
Assheikh Adam Abdullahi Al-Iloriyy, Al-Islām Fi Nayjīyya Was-Sheikh Uthman Bn Fudi
Mbaya Bn kayba Kāh, AlMadaniyyāt Fil-Muhāwalātis-Shiiriyyā
